items.name: godui-theme
items.title: GoDUI Theme
items.description: Celestial Sapphire design tokens (OKLCH) — colors, radius, fonts, shadows, button scale, and rainbow tokens shared by all GoDUI components.

theme.font-sans: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, "Noto Sans", sans-serif
theme.font-serif: ui-serif, Georgia, Cambria, "Times New Roman", Times, serif
theme.font-mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", "Courier New", monospace

items.name: magic-button
items.title: Magic Button
items.description: A tactile 3D push button with an animated rainbow edge and shadow.

.magic-button[data-variant=\"default\"].background: linear-gradient(to left, color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 50%, black) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 75%, black) 8%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 75%, black) 92%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 50%, black) 100%)

.magic-button[data-variant=\"secondary\".background: linear-gradient(to left, color-mix(in srgb, var(--secondary) 50%, black) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--secondary) 75%, black) 8%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--secondary) 75%, black) 92%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--secondary) 50%, black) 100%)

.magic-button[data-rainbow=\"true\"] .ma.background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--rainbow-1), var(--rainbow-5), var(--rainbow-3), var(--rainbow-4), var(--rainbow-2))
linear-gradient(90deg, var(--rainbow-1), var(--rainbow-5), var(--rainbow-3), var(--rainbow-4), var(--rainbow-2))

items.name: magic-tab
items.title: Magic Tab
items.description: A segmented tab bar where the selected option lifts into a 3D button with an optional rainbow edge.

.magic-tab[data-variant=\"default\"] .ma.background: linear-gradient(to left, color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 50%, black) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 75%, black) 8%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 75%, black) 92%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 50%, black) 100%)

.magic-tab[data-variant=\"secondary\"] ..background: linear-gradient(to left, color-mix(in srgb, var(--secondary) 50%, black) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--secondary) 75%, black) 8%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--secondary) 75%, black) 92%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--secondary) 50%, black) 100%)

.magic-tab[data-rainbow=\"true\"] .magic.background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--rainbow-1), var(--rainbow-5), var(--rainbow-3), var(--rainbow-4), var(--rainbow-2))
linear-gradient(90deg, var(--rainbow-1), var(--rainbow-5), var(--rainbow-3), var(--rainbow-4), var(--rainbow-2))

.magic-tab-front.transition: transform 600ms cubic-bezier(0.3, 0.7, 0.4, 1), color 250ms ease, background 250ms ease

items.name: magic-input
items.title: Magic Input
items.description: A 3D layered text input that lifts on focus with an optional rainbow edge animation.

.magic-input[data-variant=\"primary\"] ..background: linear-gradient(to left, color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 50%, black) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 75%, black) 8%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 75%, black) 92%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 50%, black) 100%)

.magic-input[data-variant=\"secondary\"].background: linear-gradient(to left, color-mix(in srgb, var(--secondary) 50%, black) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--secondary) 75%, black) 8%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--secondary) 75%, black) 92%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--secondary) 50%, black) 100%)

.magic-input[data-rainbow=\"true\"]:not(.background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--rainbow-1), var(--rainbow-5), var(--rainbow-3), var(--rainbow-4), var(--rainbow-2))
linear-gradient(90deg, var(--rainbow-1), var(--rainbow-5), var(--rainbow-3), var(--rainbow-4), var(--rainbow-2))

items.name: shimmer-button
items.title: Shimmer Button
items.description: A button with an animated shimmering border light that speeds up on hover.

items.name: progress-fold-button
items.title: Progress Fold Button
items.description: A button whose front face folds back to reveal a controlled progress bar while loading.

items.name: mask-button
items.title: Mask Button
items.description: A button whose face wipes away on hover via an animated CSS sprite-sheet mask, revealing the label behind it.

items.name: progressive-card-reveal
items.title: Progressive Card Reveal
items.description: A vertical stack of cards where one card expands to its full view while the rest collapse to compact pills, animating the morph between them.

items.name: elastic-text
items.title: Elastic Text
items.description: Variable-font text whose weight springs up under an automatic spotlight or the pointer.

items.name: text-animate
items.title: Text Animate
items.description: Staggered text entrance animations (fade, blur, slide) by character, word, or line.

items.name: highlighter
items.title: Highlighter
items.description: Hand-drawn rough-notation annotations (highlight, underline, box, circle) over text.

items.name: border-beam
items.title: Border Beam
items.description: An animated beam of light that travels around the border of its container.
